title: Ye (Joke)
wikitext:
{{Joke}} ==Description== [[File:DONDAYE.jpg|thumb|210x210px|A photo of '''Ye''' in [[Level DONDA (Joke)|Level DONDA]], inside Room 1342.]]'''Kanye West''' — also known as '''Yeezy''', or maybe just '''Ye''' — is the single native entity present in the [[The Yerooms (Joke)|Yerooms]]. He appears to be similar to a human, with similar features as those found in the Backrooms. Although described as an entity, he does not present aggressive behavior, instead representing himself as a helpful being. '''Ye''' cannot harm other living beings, and cannot be intentionally harmed. He is the (self-proclaimed) divinity that reigns all the territory present inside the Yerooms, a dimension all designed, produced and engineered by the genius himself, '''Ye'''. He happens to occasionally change his appearance when transporting from one Yevel to another, often wearing different types of masks covering his full face. '''Ye''' speaks English fluently, though older reports affirm that the being was also able to vaguely communicate in Chinese. ==Behaviors== '''Ye''' seems to have all knowledge needed to navigate throughout the Yerooms, understanding from the most complex properties and anomalies to the entrances and exits. This entity is by no means aggressive, and will be available to help the wanderers around the Yerooms — unless with paparazzi or if one attack him first. Then, be ready to survive. Otherwise, no need to be extra precautious. ==Biology == '''Ye''' is a medium-sized, moderately fit human with no other features that stand out from other entities. He is often seen with a mask, that is attached to his skin and can't be removed unless by '''Ye''' himself. Without the mask, '''Ye''' maintains a short, black hair with a goatee, frequently seen with serious facial expressions. He generally is found wearing black-colored clothing, with garments including hoodies, vests, boots, etc. ==Discovery== '''Ye''' was discovered shortly after the discovery of the Yerooms, created and named after the divinity himself. The earliest modern report of '''Ye''' is in a Reddit post made in the Backrooms' community inside the site in 2021. Before that, '''Ye''' was considered as a mutated Faceling, and the Yerooms were just a small collection of levels. ===Discovery Log, Yevel 1===
Seriously, this Level 0 wannabe is horrible. If I see an exit, I'm leaving on sight. Wait, what the f$ck... No way, is that Kanye? With his leather black jeans on? Hey, you piece of sh¨t! What are you doing here? ----Poop, scoop Whoop Whoopty-whoop ----Still. Kanye, what- ----Ye. ----Whatever; Ye, what is this whole thing? I already went through Level 0, but I know this isn't it. Do you even have any clue of going out of here? ----Stop talking Go find God Come back after you found God '''[vanishes out of thin air]''' ----Goddamn… I guess there's no other help I know, I'll stretch my hands- '''[also vanishes out of thin air]'''
